'''pawupu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:enantiopodan|enantiopodan]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| p-w-p
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:enantiopodan|enantiopodan]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| pawupu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:pæwipith|pæwipith]] || [[word:pæwipij|pæwipij]] || [[word:pæwipish|pæwipish]] || [[word:pæwipi|pæwipi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:pawuwuputh|pawuwuputh]] || [[word:pawuwupuj|pawuwupuj]] || [[word:pawuwupush|pawuwupush]] || [[word:pawuwupu|pawuwupu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:pawuputh|pawuputh]] || [[word:pawupuj|pawupuj]] || [[word:pawupush|pawupush]] || [[word:pawupu|pawupu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:pawufputh|pawufputh]] || [[word:pawufpuj|pawufpuj]] || [[word:pawufpush|pawufpush]] || [[word:pawufpuf|pawufpuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:pawuputhu|pawuputhu]] || [[word:pawupuju|pawupuju]] || [[word:pawupushu|pawupushu]] || [[word:pawupuku|pawupuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:pawuputh|pawuputh]] || [[word:pawupuj|pawupuj]] || [[word:pawupush|pawupush]] || [[word:pawupu|pawupu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:pawuputhul|pawuputhul]] || [[word:pawupujul|pawupujul]] || [[word:pawupushul|pawupushul]] || [[word:pawupukul|pawupukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:pawuputhuthu|pawuputhuthu]] || [[word:pawupujuju|pawupujuju]] || [[word:pawupushushu|pawupushushu]] || [[word:pawupuku|pawupuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:pawuputhun|pawuputhun]] || [[word:pawupujun|pawupujun]] || [[word:pawupushun|pawupushun]] || [[word:pawupukun|pawupukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:pawuputhuoro|pawuputhuoro]] || [[word:pawupujuoro|pawupujuoro]] || [[word:pawupushuoro|pawupushuoro]] || [[word:pawupukuoro|pawupukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki child nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|4a6dc77}}
